name: Molded Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin and salt in boiling water.
2. Add vinegar to the mixture.
3. Allow the mixture to cool until it is slightly thickened.
4. Stir in the salad dressing until smooth.
5. Add shredded cabbage, shredded carrots, and sweet pickle relish.
6. Pour the mixture into an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan.
7. Chill until firm.
